content:
# Expected: shows both repos, entry counts

## Summary

| Task | Stream | Description | Key Files |
|------|--------|-------------|-----------|
| 1 | 1 | Workspace config structs | `corvia-common/src/config.rs` |
| 2 | 1 | CLI scaffolding | `corvia-cli/src/main.rs` |
| 3 | 1 | Workspace module (scaffold, clone, resolve) | `corvia-cli/src/workspace.rs` |
| 4 | 1 | `workspace create` + `init` commands | `main.rs`, `workspace.rs`, `lib.rs` |
| 5 | 1 | `workspace add` + `remove` commands | `workspace.rs`, `main.rs` |
| 6 | 1 | `workspace ingest` (multi-repo, namespaced) | `workspace.rs`, `main.rs` |
| 7 | 1 | `workspace status` command | `workspace.rs`, `main.rs` |
| 8 | 1 | Workspace-aware search output | `main.rs` |
| 9 | 1 | Integration tests | `tests/integration/workspace_e2e_test.rs` |
| 10 | 2 | Demo repo structure | `/root/corvia-workspace/` |
| 11 | 2 | Devcontainer config | `.devcontainer/` |
| 12 | 2 | Pre-ingest + validate | `.corvia/knowledge/` |

**Estimated commits:** 10-12
**Dependencies:** Tasks 1-3 are sequential (config → CLI → module). Tasks 4-8 depend on 3. Task 9 depends on 1. Tasks 10-11 can proceed in parallel with Stream 1. Task 12 requires Stream 1 complete.
